name: Chicken Oregano
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breasts halves, skinned and boned
1 large Egg, beaten with 2 tbsp water
1 tsp Dried Oregano (or 1 tbsp Finely chopped fresh oregano)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place each breast half between two pieces of waxed paper and pound to a quarter-inch thickness with the flat side of a large knife.
2. Use a rolling pin if necessary.
3. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet.
4. Dip breasts in flour and shake off excess.
5. Dip in egg mixture, allowing excess to drip off.
6. Sauté in the skillet a few pieces at a time.
7. Turn once, browning on both sides for about 3 minutes total.
8. Remove and drain as they are done.
9. Meanwhile, preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Arrange chicken in a buttered shallow baking dish.
11. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and oregano.
12. Top with cheese slices.
13. Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes.
14. Remove foil and continue baking until nicely browned, about 15 to 20 minutes.
15. Serves 6.
